meta-runner.name: Setup Chalk
meta-runner.description: Download and install Chalk for build artifact observability. Wraps Docker and other build commands.

param.name: chalk.version
param.spec: type=text label='Chalk Version' description='Version to install. Leave empty for latest.' display=normal

param.name: chalk.load
param.spec: type=text label='Config URL(s)' description='Comma-separated config file paths or URLs to load.' display=normal

param.name: chalk.profile
param.spec: type=text label='Profile' description='CrashOverride profile name.' display=normal

param.name: chalk.connect
param.spec: type=checkbox label='Connect to CrashOverride' checkedValue=true uncheckedValue=false display=normal

param.name: chalk.no_wrap
param.spec: type=checkbox label='Skip command wrapping' checkedValue=true uncheckedValue=false display=normal

param.name: chalk.prefix
param.spec: type=text label='Install Prefix' description='Installation prefix (default: /usr/local).' display=normal

parameters.param:
#!/usr/bin/env bash set -eu
curl -fsSL \ "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/crashappsec/setup-chalk-action/main/setup.sh" \ -o /tmp/chalk-setup.sh chmod +x /tmp/chalk-setup.sh
CHALK_FLAGS="" [ -n "%chalk.version%" ] && CHALK_FLAGS="$CHALK_FLAGS --version=%chalk.version%" [ -n "%chalk.load%" ] && CHALK_FLAGS="$CHALK_FLAGS --load=%chalk.load%" [ "%chalk.profile%" != "default" ] && CHALK_FLAGS="$CHALK_FLAGS --profile=%chalk.profile%" [ "%chalk.connect%" = "true" ] && CHALK_FLAGS="$CHALK_FLAGS --connect" [ "%chalk.no_wrap%" = "true" ] && CHALK_FLAGS="$CHALK_FLAGS --no-wrap"
CHALK_PREFIX="%chalk.prefix%" \ CHALK_TOKEN="%env.CHALK_TOKEN%" \ /tmp/chalk-setup.sh $CHALK_FLAGS
"%chalk.prefix%/bin/chalk" --version rm -f /tmp/chalk-setup.sh
